item.title: Avoid Vague Resume Language 🚫 • Replace 'improved sales' with specifics. • Use: “I increased sales by 20% in Q1.” • Quantify achievements whenever possible. • Provide context for your results. • Show impact with numbers or percentages. 📊 How can you quantify your achievements for maximum impact? #resume #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Avoid Vague Resume Language 🚫 • Replace 'improved sales' with specifics. • Use: “I increased sales by 20% in Q1.” • Quantify achievements whenever possible. • Provide context for your results. • Show impact with numbers or percentages. 📊 How can you quantify your achievements for maximum impact? #resume #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
